revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:W3C validation/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:W3C validation/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:W3C validation/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:W3C validation/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:W3C validation/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:W3C validation/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === This template creates a page link to the [[W3C]] Markup Validation Service. Note that pages will always be validated against the default skin, which is now Vector.
Syntax is:
{{tlx|W3C validation|pagename}}
For example, to validate this page:
:{{W3C validation|Template:W3C validation}}
==Issues== For current Wikipedia validation issues, see [[WP:HTMLBUGS]].
=== See also ===
<includeonly> <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> {{uncat}} </includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === This template creates a page link to the [[:en:W3C|W3C]] Markup Validation Service. Note that pages will always be validated against the default skin, which is now Vector.
Syntax is:
{{tlx|W3C validation|pagename}}
For example, to validate this page:

==Issues== For current Wikipedia validation issues, see [[WP:HTMLBUGS]].
=== See also ===

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === This template creates a page link to the [[:en:W3C|W3C]] Markup Validation Service. Note that pages will always be validated against the default skin, which is now Vector.
Syntax is:
{{tlx|W3C validation|pagename}}
For example, to validate this page:

==Issues== For current Wikipedia validation issues, see [[WP:HTMLBUGS]].

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === This template creates a page link to the [[:en:W3C|W3C]] Markup Validation Service. Note that pages will always be validated against the default skin, which is now Vector.
Syntax is:
{{tlx|W3C validation|pagename}}
For example, to validate this page:
:{{W3C validation|Template:W3C validation}}
==Issues== For current Wikipedia validation issues, see [[WP:HTMLBUGS]].
=== See also ===

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === This template creates a page link to the [[:en:W3C|W3C]] Markup Validation Service. Note that pages will always be validated against the default skin, which is now Vector.
Syntax is:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === This template creates a page link to the [[:en:W3C|W3C]] Markup Validation Service. Note that pages will always be validated against the default skin, which is now Vector.
Syntax is:
{{tlx|W3C validation|pagename}}
For example, to validate this page:

==Issues== For current Wikipedia validation issues, see [[WP:HTMLBUGS]].
=== See also ===
<includeonly> <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> {{uncat}} </includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
